title: RAiDxJJ Hypixel Skyblock Modpack
body:
**This is my own Hypixel Skyblock Modpack.**
> **_MC-VERSION 1.21.5 - 1.21.10_**
###  It contains:
- ALL my **Mods,**
- my **Config** and, 
- my **Texturepacks**

> This is how **I** play **_Hypixel Skyblock_** and if you want it to look the same or just search for a **good Modpack** THIS if for **you!**

<details>
<summary>MODS</summary>

**_General Mods_**

- Mod Menu
- Skyboxify
- No Tool Tips
- Sodium
- Lithium
- Sounds Be Gone!
- WI Zoom
- Very Many Players
- Borderless Fullscreen
- Chat Plus
- Bad Optimizations
- Compacting (for chat)
- Custom FOV
- Essential Mod

**_Skyblock related Mods:_**

- Skyhanni
- Firmament
- Skyblocker
- Skyblock Addons Unofficial
- NoFrills
- Roughly Enough Items (REI)
- REI Search Bar Calculations
- Skyblock Tweaks
- Skyblock Garden Teleporter
- Dulkir

</details>

<details>
<summary>Texturepacks</summary>

**_Added Texturepacks_**

- **RAiDxJJ - Main Texturepack** _(by RAiDxJJ)_
- **Furfsky** _(by the **Furfsky** Team)_

</details>


_(This Pack is only for Hypixel Skyblock and not made for other servers)_

If there is a problem or a mistake i made tell me on [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/fwj57BDFfW)

(or per Discord DM) - raid62

**Socials:**

[Tiktok](https://www.tiktok.com/@raid.jj)
